key_evidence: Taliban Decree No. 18 (May 14): no minimum marriage age; child marriage only annullable after puberty — codifies child marriage
Women civil servants terminated without pay (January 2026) — removes economic survival pathways for an entire class
People's Tribunal (Dec 2025) found the Taliban guilty of crimes against humanity including gender apartheid
21.9 million (45% of population) require humanitarian assistance; 3 million returnees in 2025 straining collapsed services
OHCHR (Mar 2026): human-rights situation continues to deteriorate dramatically
methodology_note: Floor confirmation at 0.0. METHODOLOGY RULING: GENDER-APARTHEID-FORMAL-RECOGNITION formalized as an independent 0.0-floor-qualifying conduct category. A state policy that systematically and by law extinguishes the civic, economic, and bodily-autonomy capacity of half its population (women/girls), including elimination of any minimum marriage age, is the definitional 0.0 harm-flag case. People's Tribunal finding + Decree No. 18 anchor the category. No composite movement (already at floor).
